ddls:
CREATE TABLE "broadcasts" (
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broadcast */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the broadcast content */,
  "match_datetime" TEXT /* Datetime when the broadcast occurred */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broadcasting station */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "iashow_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the broadcast in the archive system */,
  "iapreview_thumb" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the broadcast */,
  "snippet" TEXT /* Text snippet summarizing the content */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the broadcast in seconds */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the content */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for easier search and categorization */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to support version control */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the broadcast was added to the archive */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the broadcast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broadcast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broadcasts_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broadcasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the broadcasting station */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the broadcasting station */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the station's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the station's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_name" TEXT /* Name of the show */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the show */,
  "host" TEXT /* Name of the host(s) of the show */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language(s) in which the show is broadcasted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the show first aired */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the show last aired (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., guest, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broadcast being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the broadcast */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the broadcast was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the content */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the content */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_broadcast_id FOREIGN KEY ("broadcast_id") REFERENCES broadcasts ("broadcast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thumbnails" (
  "thumbnail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thumbnail */,
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broadcast the thumbnail belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the thumbnail image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the thumbnail was uploaded */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the thumbnail image */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the thumbnail image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thumbnail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thumbnails_broadcast_id FOREIGN KEY ("broadcast_id") REFERENCES broadcasts ("broadcast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snippets" (
  "snippet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each snippet */,
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broadcast the snippet belongs to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Text content summarizing the broadcast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the snippet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the snippet was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the snippet (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snippet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippets_broadcast_id FOREIGN KEY ("broadcast_id") REFERENCES broadcasts ("broadcast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content usage entry */,
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broadcast */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the broadcast */,
  "total_downloads" INTEGER /* Total number of downloads for the broadcast */,
  "total_snippets" INTEGER /* Total number of snippets created for the broadcast */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date of the last access to the broadcast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_usage_broadcast_id FOREIGN KEY ("broadcast_id") REFERENCES broadcasts ("broadcast_id")
)
